content.text: I need a reliable way to download and load the MNIST dataset for training and testing my neural networks.
If I want only the training data and don't need validation or test sets at all, how would I modify the logic?
The current function loads all three splits (train, validation, test). To get just one split, you would need to alter the `pickle.load(h)` logic to selectively unpack only what is required.
That makes much more sense now.
